name: Тчиру «Дым»
notes: Tchiru the Smoke, a small goblin alchemist of the Kragmir fighting club and the youngest of its five champions. She wins with gadgets rather than muscle: nonlethal bombs that blind, deafen, and pin, plus smoke and a choking cloud that breaks up a party and smothers its casters.

strikes.name: concussion bomb
strikes.text: On a hit, the target attempts a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24] save; on a failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Deafened] for 1 round and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy] 1 for 1 round. Spends one Concussion Bomb.

strikes.name: flash bomb
strikes.text: On a hit, the target attempts a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24] save; on a failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled] for 1 minute, and on a critical failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded] for 1 round instead. Spends one Flash Bomb.

strikes.name: tanglefoot bomb
strikes.text: On a hit, the target attempts a @Check[type:reflex|dc:24] save; on a failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Immobilized] for 1 round or until it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Escape]s (DC 24) or Forces Open the goo (DC 22). Spends one Tanglefoot Bomb.

actions.name: Quick Bomber
actions.text: Tchiru Interacts to draw a bomb, then Strikes with it.

actions.name: Choking Cloud
actions.text:
Frequency once per fight.

Tchiru vents her canister in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] of caustic smoke. Each creature in the area attempts a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24] save; on a failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened] 1 and cannot use Concentrate actions for 1 round. Spends the Choking Cloud Canister.

actions.name: Debilitating Bomb
actions.text: Every bomb Tchiru throws carries a condition, so her value is control and debuffs rather than raw damage.

description.value:
Activate 1 Strike

A nonlethal concussive charge, thrown up to 20 feet. It deals @Damage[(2d6)[bludgeoning]] damage and 2 bludgeoning splash damage. On a hit, the target attempts a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24] save; on a failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Deafened] for 1 round and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Clumsy] 1 for 1 round.

Activate 1 Strike

A blinding flash charge, thrown up to 20 feet. It deals @Damage[(1d4)[bludgeoning]] damage and 1 bludgeoning splash damage. On a hit, the target attempts a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24] save; on a failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Dazzled] for 1 minute, and on a critical failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Blinded] for 1 round instead.

Activate 1 Strike

A shell of sticky alchemical goo, thrown up to 20 feet. On a hit, the target attempts a @Check[type:reflex|dc:24] save; on a failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Immobilized] for 1 round or until it @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Escape]s (DC 24) or Forces Open the goo (DC 22).

Activate 2 (manipulate)

A single burst of caustic smoke that fills a @Template[type:cone|distance:15]. Each creature in the area attempts a @Check[type:fortitude|dc:24] save; on a failure it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Sickened] 1 and cannot use Concentrate actions for 1 round.
